title: The Human Expantion Project
wikitext:
[]: The Human Expantion Project             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jan 28, 2008 1:34 am OK, now up until ep 6, The Instrumentality Project was called the Human Expansion Project. But in ep 21 with the creation of Nerv. After Yui's disappearance, Gendo was talking to Fuyutsuki about the new project they would be starting that day. The Human Instrumentality Project. Now, way back in 2002 (I think), they called in Instrumentality, but in the beginning of the series it was Human Expansion, and after ep 6 is was Instrumentality again. WTF!

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Jan 28, 2008 1:38 am Bad translation. Platinum subs have it as HIP from the start.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jan 28, 2008 1:40 am Back when it was HEP, Gendo said that is was only going to be called that for a while, before it was re-classified.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 28, 2008 2:34 am The Japanese on Seele's report in episode 02 says "Human Instrumentality Project (Provisional Name)". Jinrui Hokan Keikaku is the only name the project ever has, despite the "provisional name" bit.

chunks.content:
Article: The Human Expantion Project
[]: The Human Expantion Project             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jan 28, 2008 1:34 am OK, now up until ep 6, The Instrumentality Project was called the Human Expansion Project. But in ep 21 with the creation of Nerv. After Yui's disappearance, Gendo was talking to Fuyutsuki about the new project they would be starting that day. The Human Instrumentality Project. Now, way back in 2002 (I think), they called in Instrumentality, but in the beginning of the series it was Human Expansion, and after ep 6 is was Instrumentality again. WTF!

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Jan 28, 2008 1:38 am Bad translation. Platinum subs have it as HIP from the start.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jan 28, 2008 1:40 am Back when it was HEP, Gendo said that is was only going to be called that for a while, before it was re-classified.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 28, 2008 2:34 am The Japanese on Seele's report in episode 02 says "Human Instrumentality Project (Provisional Name)". Jinrui Hokan Keikaku is the only name the project ever has, despite the "provisional name" bit.
